/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG   CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_array.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_codecs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_sharding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_store.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_v2_metadata.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_v3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_zip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libzarr_tests.dir/tests/test_fs_store.cpp.o  -o libzarr_tests  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /home/pkharchenko/opt/blosc/lib/libblosc.a -lpthread /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so
